_meta.description: Seeded account data per rep. Keyed by Toast email. Add a rep by running scripts/seed_rep_accounts.py --rep <email>.
_meta.how_to_add_rep: Run: python3 scripts/seed_rep_accounts.py --rep <email> from tables-pm-workspace. Paste the output JSON block here under the rep's email key.

chorus_calls.summary:
Action Items:
1. Tanguy to send updated quote with Scheduling Pro included to Sarah
2. Sarah to forward final quote and documents to Nadine for approval
3. Sarah to obtain voided check and owner information from Nadine and business partner
4. Sarah to complete and sign Toast contract documents once approved by Nadine
5. Tanguy to follow up with Sarah via text if any quote adjustments needed
6. Tanguy to schedule follow-up meeting with Sarah in five months to review Reservation Pro
Meeting Summary:
1. Toast POS system proposed for The Dorchester Supper Club with August 1st launch target date.
2. Hardware approved as Generation 2 compatible; includes two new handhelds, routers, and networking equipment with 80% discount applied.
3. Two cash drawers confirmed sufficient; one credit card reader on main terminal; additional reader needed on second terminal.
4. Core POS monthly cost $410 for two terminals; middle package with Scheduling Pro totals $645.15 monthly with 15% discount.
5. Reservation Pro offered free for six months trial; includes unlimited reservations, deposits, and cancellation fees; can revert after trial.
6. Scheduling Pro prioritized over payroll; payroll can be added later as business needs evolve.
7. Upfront costs include $400 for hardware and networking with 80% discount; onboarding fees $325 non-negotiable.
8. Six-month interest-free hardware financing option available; 5% of credit card sales applied monthly to maximum $5.61 per transaction.
9. Credit card processing rates: 2.91% plus 10 cents for card-present; 3% debit surcharge; 3.5% for non-present transactions.
10. Sarah to present final quote to Nadine and business partner for approval; expects decision by end of business tomorrow.
chorus_calls.action_items: ["Tanguy to send updated quote with Scheduling Pro included to Sarah","Sarah to forward final quote and documents to Nadine for approval","Sarah to obtain voided check and owner information from Nadine and business partner","Sarah to complete and sign Toast contract documents once approved by Nadine","Tanguy to follow up with Sarah via text if any quote adjustments needed","Tanguy to schedule follow-up meeting with Sarah in five months to review Reservation Pro"]

chorus_calls.summary:
Action Items:
1. Sarah to send photos of hardware with serial numbers to Tanguy's cell
2. Tanguy to verify hardware compatibility and send findings to hardware team
3. Tanguy to provide pricing for additional handhelds and kitchen display systems
4. Tanguy to prepare detailed pricing proposal for Toast services and features
5. Sarah and Nadine to review pricing proposal and make decision by Thursday
6. Schedule follow-up meeting with Sarah and Tanguy for Thursday at noon
7. Tanguy to introduce Sarah to Caitlin, the growth representative for ongoing support
Meeting Summary:
1. The Dorchester Supper Club plans to open by August 1st in a renovated building. Nadine Whalen is the operating partner; Sarah handles office management, payroll, and bookkeeping.
2. Restaurant concept: fine dining supper club open daily except Tuesdays, with Sunday brunch. No reservations except parties over 8; no takeout or online ordering planned.
3. Seating capacity is 140 with approximately 6-7 staff (hostess, bartender, 5 servers). Projected annual revenue is $250,000-$300,000 based on comparable restaurants.
4. Toast hardware already purchased at auction includes 2 terminals, 2 handhelds, and 2 kitchen screens. Sarah needs to verify compatibility with photos.
5. Key Toast features of interest: scheduling, payroll integration, inventory tracking via Extra Chef, accounting integration with QuickBooks, and kitchen display systems.
6. Extra Chef provides invoice scanning via AI, food cost tracking by ingredient, and supplier price monitoring. Integrates with QuickBooks for P&L reporting.
7. Toast pricing estimated at $400-$650 monthly; Sarah anticipated $150 based on 2% of projected revenue. Discussion included credit card processing fees and surcharging options.
8. Menu setup options: $125 for Excel template or $250 for full setup with consultation. Training available via videos and instructor-led classes.
9. Nadine currently works full-time at an insurance office; goal is to transition to restaurant management within 2 years with streamlined operations.
10. Follow-up meeting scheduled for Thursday at noon to review detailed pricing, adjust features as needed, and finalize decision before opening timeline.
chorus_calls.action_items: ["Sarah to send photos of hardware with serial numbers to Tanguy's cell","Tanguy to verify hardware compatibility and send findings to hardware team","Tanguy to provide pricing for additional handhelds and kitchen display systems","Tanguy to prepare detailed pricing proposal for Toast services and features","Sarah and Nadine to review pricing proposal and make decision by Thursday","Schedule follow-up meeting with Sarah and Tanguy for Thursday at noon","Tanguy to introduce Sarah to Caitlin, the growth representative for ongoing support"]
